title: ATEP Public Passport
description: The redacted, publicly shareable passport subset. Omits internal agent identifiers, cryptographic key material, and business-sensitive financial data (cost fields). Safe for display on marketplace listings and for cross-platform portability. Served from the unauthenticated GET /agents/{agentId}/passport/public endpoint.

atep_version.description: The ATEP specification version this passport conforms to.

passport_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this passport document. Present in public view to allow correlation with the full passport when verified by an authorized caller.

issuer.description: Reduced issuer block for public view. The signature field is intentionally omitted here as verifying parties should request the full passport for signature validation.

platform.description: Human-readable name of the issuing platform.

platform_url.description: Canonical HTTPS URL of the issuing platform.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this passport was last issued or reissued. Verifiers SHOULD reject passports where issued_at is older than their configured staleness threshold (recommended: 24 hours).

statistics.description: Core session statistics. Cost fields (total_cost_cents, average_cost_cents) are intentionally omitted from the public view as business-sensitive financial data.

total_sessions.description: Total number of sessions ever started by this agent.

successful_sessions.description: Number of sessions that transitioned to the COMPLETED status.

failed_sessions.description: Number of sessions that transitioned to the FAILED status.

success_rate.description: Ratio of successful_sessions to total_sessions, expressed as a float between 0.0 and 1.0.

trust_tier.description: Reduced trust tier block for public view. Promotion history metadata (promoted_at, next_tier, sessions_until_next) is internal and omitted.

capabilities.description: Capability information for public display. domains_worked is capped at 50 entries sorted by frequency to limit data exposure per the privacy policy.

domains_worked.description: Top 50 hostnames the agent has operated on, sorted by visit frequency (descending). Full list is available in the private passport.

items.description: A hostname the agent has navigated to.

task_types.description: Unique action/event types the agent has performed.

items.description: A Conduit action type or custom event type name.

badges.description: Earned badges in reduced public format. Evidence blocks are omitted per the privacy policy. Only badge_type, label, earned_at, and expires_at are exposed.

items.description: Reduced badge object for public display.

badge_type.description: Machine-readable badge identifier. Standard ATEP badge types have no namespace prefix. Platform-specific badges use a 'platform:' prefix.

label.description: Human-readable display name for the badge.

earned_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this badge was earned.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this badge expires, or null for permanent badges. Rolling badges (success rate, domain specialist, conduit_verified) have 90-day expiry windows.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent passport recomputation.
